name: super-memory-brain-package
description: Focused native Windows skill injector with BAT/VBS entrypoints, global ZCode/Codex shared-memory injection, custom agent skill directory injection, preview-first install-backup cleanup, Hybrid Recall, ADR decision records, Memory Eval Harness, structured local memory, package-root and memory-root hot-load markers, scoped memory roots, verification, share privacy guards, silent START response discipline, Commander review gates, team memory retrieval, roadmap management, recall regression checks, task state reporting, cross-agent/session task identity indexing, lightweight task registration fast path, compact task status tables, scriptable intent gating, recovery E2E checks, detailed step ledgers, ranked resume candidates, host cache checks, paste-free current-task resume, ZCode TodoWrite avoidance, privacy sentinel checks, completion guard, maintenance tools, strict task verification parameter binding, smoke-test policy restoration, regression guards for completion-state isolation, dispatch learning, trigger simulation, intent routing, smart next actions, health summaries, agent scorecards, agent bridge isolation/failover, shared channel conversations with active target mode, task handoff, bridge dispatch packets, bridge role permissions, bridge queue relay, team-task archival, release readiness checks, a unified brain command, and safe version bump previews, and a read-only optimization advisor, and causal change plans for structural problem-solving, plus automatic workspace lifecycle maintenance, auto memory hygiene, policy-governed post-task maintenance hooks, self-improvement queues, compaction-safe continuation priority, and evidence-bounded engineering decision gates.

scriptTiers.T1: low-risk generated state, package copy, or verification scripts
scriptTiers.T2: controlled memory, hook, graph, install, or fix scripts requiring clear intent
scriptTiers.T3: high-impact delete, private export, backup pruning, or broad overwrite scripts requiring explicit manual use

scriptMetadata.notes: Installs skills, refreshes hook, backs up existing skills, writes package-root.txt and memory-root.txt markers, supports Shared/SplitMemory scoped roots, and rolls back on failure.
Windows install entrypoint; launches the native UI by default and supports console fallback with the console/cmd argument.

Native Windows WinForms skill injector UI for global ZCode/Codex shared-memory injection, custom Agent skills directory injection, and preview-first install-backup cleanup; delegates to existing scripts and preserves typed confirmations for destructive operations.
No-console Windows launcher for install-ui.ps1.
Read-only install UI path preflight for package roots, required UI scripts, workspace paths, merge-overlay, and common Agent skills directories.
Read-only health check.
Read-only status view.
Read-only aggregate diagnostics using summary, startup, skill sync, memory health, script tier views, recent verification state, and structured risk aggregation.
Central maintenance entrypoint: read-only plan by default, low-risk maintenance with -ApplySafe, confirmed high-impact maintenance with -ApplyConfirmed.

Plans or applies low-risk workspace lifecycle cleanup for expired session bindings, expired Agent Bridge channels, stale active pointers, stale locks, generated temp files, and evidence-preserving draft visibility.
Plans or applies low-risk automatic memory hygiene: overlong memory compression with original evidence archive, duplicate cleanup with archive, and private-pattern hits surfaced for confirmation.
Post-task maintenance hook that runs workspace lifecycle, auto hygiene, self-improvement queue update, state refresh, and status snapshot after task verification so safe maintenance is proactive.
Maintains a candidate-only self-improvement queue from hygiene, lifecycle, doctor, reflection, and user-feedback signals without automatic skill mutation or external publishing.
Read-only compact Super Brain summary.
Read-only script safety tier view.
Read-only memory health summary with layer, summary, expiry, feedback, decision, ADR, and privacy counters without raw memory output.
Creates package backups.
Dry-run by default; deletes old backups only with -Apply.
Copies package to another destination.
Candidate report only.
Exact duplicate report only.
Dry-run with -WhatIfOnly; memory mutation requires -Force.
Writes long-term memory through governance gate with MemoryMode, Layer, Summary, ExpiresAt, privacy, and negative feedback handling.
Writes structured reusable experience entries and updates memory/workspace/experience-index.md.
Memory audit report.
Updates baseline and writes memory; legacy manual tool.
Creates a privacy-clean slim share package; destination deletion is protected by path guards and share marker checks.
Default verification avoids share/temp-install integration; integration switches run heavier validation.
State-first auto-check; may run verification when needed.
Read-only startup hook/config check.
Writes lightweight state cache.
Reads state and may initialize missing cache.
Read-only Hybrid Recall helper with Sandglass, graph, state, and recent candidates plus TopK, MaxTokens, Layer, MemoryMode, score, confidence, reason, and token estimates.
Read-only recent memory helper.

Writes memory/workspace/last-session-restore.json with a token-budgeted new-session continuity packet: state, checkpoint, last snapshot, experience-index preview, and optional evidence cards only when memory triggers justify recall.

Creates, reads, expires, and clears temporary session-binding evidence bundles in memory/workspace without writing raw chat or durable shared memory; respects memory:off, TTL, package version, and active memory root guards.

Governed learn-this protocol wrapper over write-memory.ps1 and write-experience.ps1; supports preview-first learning, -TextFile compact drafts for long-context safe writes, similar-memory duplicate checks, profile-card refresh, compact stable summaries, and memory/workspace/last-learn-memory.json.
Checks log/snapshot freshness by age and package version before current-state conclusions so stale evidence is not treated as live truth.
Read-only static integrity check for continuity, freshness, and learning script markers.
Maintains Project Graph Continuity artifacts with task lifecycle actions CompleteTask, ArchiveTask, and ClearTask plus project/task/step/finding status for crash-safe continuation.
Builds a lightweight PowerShell script/function/call graph index with AST-backed dynamic call and workspace dataflow edges into memory/workspace for impact analysis and continuity.
Maintains detailed step-ledger state with open/completed/blocked/skipped buckets, evidence, related files, verification commands/results, blockers, reasons, and next actions.
Reports change impact, affected scripts/workspace files, risk level, and recommended verification commands from codegraph and continuity artifacts.
Builds memory/workspace/profile-card.json as a small profile/persona preference card for new-session restore without injecting raw long memory.
Compares package and installed skill files plus package-root.txt and memory-root.txt markers.
Switches installed ZCode/Codex memory-root.txt markers between Shared, SplitMemory, Group, and per-agent scoped roots while writing sharing policy and scope markers.
Installs the Super Brain skill set for any agent skill directory and points memory-root.txt at shared, private agent, or group memory roots.

Hot-refreshes already installed Super Brain skill copies for ZCode/Codex or provided skill roots without changing memory mode; writes memory/workspace/last-hot-refresh.json and may require new agent sessions if skill content is cached.
Checks installed ZCode/Codex Super Brain skill copies, package-root and memory-root markers, last hot-refresh state, and reports current-session cache limitations.
Interactive PowerShell menu behind install.bat for ZCode/Codex, auto-detected agents, manual SkillRoot installs, memory mode changes, cleanup, diagnostics, and CI.
Dry-run by default; deletes only verified migrated memory-zcode and memory-codex legacy roots with -Apply.
Dry-run by default; keeps the newest install backups and deletes older install-backup-* folders only with -Apply.
Rewrites session-start hook with a short stable memory router prefix; backs up by default.
Read-only by default; can fix encoding issues with -Fix.
Read-only by default; can normalize graph with -Fix.
Writes structured decision particles, governed memory, graph decision edges, and optional ADR records with status, context, consequences, alternatives, owner, scope, and supersedes links.
Read-only structured decision and ADR graph search with current-first TopK, MaxTokens, AdrOnly, Status, Owner, Scope, and superseded filtering.
Read-only decision and ADR audit covering graph parse errors, current conflicts, schema gaps, invalid status, supersedes links, particles, and memory lifecycle.
High-impact install, fix, and verification flow.
Copies private package including memory; not for sharing.
Builds and verifies slim share package.
Verifies share privacy and slimness.
Versioned share release flow.
Appends graph lineage edges.
Read-only graph search.
Read-only candidate fact extraction.
Read-only legacy recall fixture tests with text and JSON output.
Read-only Memory Eval Harness over static, Hybrid Recall, and decision/ADR fixtures with JSON metrics.
Runs Memory Eval Harness and writes memory/workspace/last-memory-eval.json for auditability.
Dry-run by default; memory mutation requires -Apply.
Default one-command local CI for install-ready stability checks; writes memory/workspace/last-ci.json and includes Memory Eval Harness reporting.
Syntax lint and optional PSScriptAnalyzer checks.
Runs Pester tests when Pester is installed; skips cleanly otherwise.
Writes task verification evidence, completes checkpoints, refreshes continuity task completion when safe, and writes crash-resume status snapshots.
Read-only roadmap status card combining roadmap ADR recall, current baseline, team-task status, and latest task verification.
Read-only recall regression checks for critical memories such as agent/subagent roadmap, team memory retrieval, version route recall, and G1 display rule.
Read-only task state report for current version, verification, hot refresh, roadmap completion, remaining work, and review gate blockers.

Builds a shared cross-agent/session task identity index from task cards, session cards, active checkpoint, task graph, step ledger, status card, and recent verification with ranked resume candidates and compact Markdown task status tables.

Fast path for shared task status registration: writes only shared agent/session/task/link identity cards and does not touch active checkpoints or run doctor, verify, hot-refresh, CI, dashboard, auto-check, or recall. Auto mode reuses matching active/paused/blocked task cards to avoid duplicates.
Lightweight automatic scout for task cards, workspace state, and compact memory hints before execution; avoids raw long-history injection.
Writes a compact goal reasoning card with why, success criteria, non-goals, efficiency options, risks, and verification plan before acting.
Default automatic cognitive execution loop for natural goals: intent gate, memory scout, why-plan, task card auto create/update, current task context, and next action.
E2E verification that natural execute goals auto-create/reuse a task card while question/plan-only goals do not mutate.
Read-only privacy sentinel over memory-health private-pattern counters; warns before sharing memory and never deletes memory automatically.

Read-only completion gate that aggregates package verification, hot refresh, task verification, roadmap recall, memory regression, task state, review gate, privacy sentinel status, and rejects lingering active checkpoints.
Writes compact accepted-constraints preflight guards from current decisions, Hybrid Recall, active checkpoint, and session binding before code/rule/architecture changes without raw memory tails.
Writes compact cognitive execution preflight cards with user hard rules, accepted constraints, similar experiences, domain reflexes, mustPreserve items, and driftGuards before substantial actions.
Creates/checks goal-route-lock.json so approved goals, routes, non-goals, mustPreserve, and mustNotDriftTo remain active during long or high-risk work.
Writes route-checkpoint.json / last-route-checkpoint.json and reports ROUTE_DRIFT_DETECTED when current actions drift from the accepted goal route.
Records verified module snapshots with behavior, entrypoint, inputs, environment, dependencies, state assumptions, command, evidence, and snapshotHash.
Compares verified module contract with current integration context and separates module smoke OK, integration smoke OK, and user-facing acceptance OK; reports INTEGRATION_DRIFT_DETECTED.

Writes causal change plans that connect observed problem, root cause, known facts, prior changes, proposed intervention, expected optimization, verification method, and residual risk before meaningful changes.

Writes task-scoped evidence-bounded engineering decisions with FACT/INFERENCE/UNKNOWN separation, root-cause confidence, objective/constraints/options/tradeoffs/criteria, qualified optimality, dependency-ordered step contracts, acceptance, and residual risk; rejects unsupported facts, untested critical unknowns, and unjustified optimal claims.

Creates current-task-context.json so guard scripts inherit one taskId, accepted goal, route, causal/engineering/integration evidence paths, and completion requirements instead of trusting stale global last-* state.
Runs negative guard E2E checks proving stale task evidence, integration mismatch, missing acceptance evidence, broad lessons, and scope creep are blocked.
Anti-overfitting gate requiring scope, evidence, applies/does-not-apply conditions, counterexamples/falsifiers, and confidence before durable lesson promotion.
Runs an end-to-end guard flow across goal-route lock, route checkpoints, causal plan/review, verified module snapshot, integration parity, and behavior replay.
Replays verified module behavior contracts against integrated actual outputs and reports INTEGRATION_BEHAVIOR_MISMATCH when behavior diverges.
Reviews causal change plans by comparing expected optimization with actual evidence and requiring keep/revise/rollback decisions before completion or learning promotion.
Writes last-cognitive-enforce.json as a hard gate so high-risk intents cannot skip cognitive-preflight, mustPreserve, and driftGuards before action.
Writes runtime-drift-checkpoint.json and last-runtime-drift-checkpoint.json with DRIFT_DETECTED, unresolvedDrift, phase checks, AgentBridge drift guards, and completion drift protection.

Self-learning reflection promotion pipeline: Analyze/Preview by default, Apply only after evidence, privacy, duplicate, confidence, and reusable-scope checks; routes to learn-memory, write-experience, or skill-evolution without direct skill mutation.

Writes, completes, clears, or reads the active checkpoint lifecycle and shared identity cards with platform, agentId, agent, sessionId, sessionName, taskId, taskName, memoryIds, current step, blockers, next action, and evidence.
Read-only state control dashboard for version, roadmap, task, verification, hot refresh, memory regression, privacy, review gate, active checkpoint, risks, and next action.
Read-only continuation advisor that restores next action from dashboard, last task verification, and last status snapshot.
Writes compact crash-resume status snapshots and status cards including dashboard, continuity, task graph, impact advisor, and codegraph summaries.
Read-only locator for memory private-pattern hits with file, line, pattern, preview, and likely false-positive hints.
Read-only WhatIf memory quality cleanup planner for untagged lines, too-long entries, and malformed decision particles.
Read-only optimization advisor that aggregates doctor, memory quality, memory eval, backup retention, CI, and hot-refresh signals into prioritized next actions.
Read-only experience-index replay helper that finds matching lessons before repeated repairs or direction changes.
Read-only dispatch learning report from private team-task history with template stats, blocked-task counters, and routing recommendations.
Read-only trigger simulation tests for common continuation, search, release, architecture, and memory-sensitive routing scenarios.

Read-only cold-start and output-discipline audit that proves ordinary continue, casual G1/brain mentions, Light dashboard, and stale auto-check paths do not wake deep recall, team dispatch, full dashboard checks, or full verification by default.
Runs recovery end-to-end checks for plan-only, status-only, continue restore, task-list buckets, and OCR/log noise isolation; writes last-recovery-e2e.json.
Read-only user intent classifier for continuation, status, fixes, features, release, memory recall, and team/review requests.
Scripts execution permission gating for plan_only, status_only, execute, and clarify intents; writes last-intent-gate.json and prevents accidental mutation on plan/status/noise turns.
Read-only next-action advisor combining intent routing, auto-continuation, dashboard state, and dispatch learning.
Read-only compact human health summary for version, readiness, risks, locks, optional tool warnings, recent task, and recommended next action.
Read-only optional host-tool schema warning status; helps diagnose TodoWrite/schema drift while preserving checkpoint fallback.
Read-only Agent Team scorecards from template definitions and private team-task history.
Writes memory/workspace/last-retrospective.json with concise task lessons, evidence, and next-improvement hints.
Read-only release readiness check for current verification, full CI, hot refresh, privacy, and share package freshness.
Unified read-only Super Brain command for status, next action, intent classification, release readiness, scorecards, dispatch learning, CI hints, and help.
Double-click launcher for the Super Brain Console UI; delegates to brain-ui.vbs and reports startup failures.
No-console launcher for the Super Brain Console application with first-run setup checks.
Safe version bump helper: dry-run preview by default, updates manifest, changelog, baseline, history, and graph lineage only with -Apply.
Read-only Commander dispatch scoring for direct, single_delegate, team_parallel, and review_board levels.
Lists private workspace Agent Team templates and initializes default templates when missing.
Selects an Agent Team template from dispatch level and reasons without mutating team-task records.
Creates a private workspace team-task JSON record for Commander-led subagent collaboration memory.
Adds an evidence-focused subagent delegation report to a team-task record.
Records Commander authorization for a code-capable delegation with allowed files, forbidden files, success criteria, verification commands, rollback, drift guard, and pending review.
Records Commander review for code-capable delegations and flags out-of-scope or forbidden changed files.

Read-only Drift Guard + Commander Review Gate for team-task records; blocks unfinished Commander decisions, unverified tasks, unreviewed code-capable delegations, missing authorization fields, and drift guard failures.
Read-only Team Memory Retrieval over private team-task records with query, scoring, top-k summaries, and optional delegation evidence.
Read-only audit for code-capable delegation authorization, review, drift, and blocked scope expansion counters.
Records Commander adoption, rejection, conflict, and memory-admission decisions for team-task findings.
Read-only team-task index and recent collaboration status view.
Rebuilds private workspace team-task index from team-task JSON records.
Temporary install smoke test for install-ready behavior. Supports opt-in extension install smoke checks.
Verifies shared memory file locks and atomic writes under concurrent PowerShell writers.
Shared helpers for hook discovery, scoped memory layout, sharing policy, scope markers, runtime file inventory, and UTF-8 no BOM writes.
Writes compressed session notes.

Dry-run by default; imports old memory from memory\merge-overlay or legacy roots, supports Merge/Overwrite modes, can clean the import folder after successful -Apply, and never deletes legacy roots by default.
Legacy internal helper with hardcoded local paths; excluded from share.
Legacy internal helper with hardcoded local paths; excluded from share.
Read-only verification for optional extension manifests, bundled SKILL.md files, provenance, duplicate names, excluded categories, and installed-name collision warnings.
Maintains isolated multi-agent bridge sessions under memory/workspace/agent-bridge with compact task packets, heartbeat, failover, task handoff, advisory results, and Commander-only adoption.

Maintains isolated shared channel conversations between agent sessions with Open/Connect/Send/Inbox/Ack/WaitReply/SendAndWait/Active/Close/Status, active target-mode binding, target-session routing, compact evidence cards, and no durable shared-memory adoption by default.
Generates isolated handoff/failover dispatch packets and target-agent startup prompts from active agent-bridge state without sending externally or writing shared memory.
Maintains isolated bridge role permissions for reader/advisor/code-suggester/adopt-requester/commander and checks allowed bridge operations.
Maintains a lightweight isolated bridge message queue with Enqueue/Poll/Ack/Status/Clear for non-real-time agent relay.
Dry-run-first archival for old team-task files; only moves files with -Apply and keeps recent tasks visible.

Lightweight SkillOpt-inspired governance loop: captures compact failure samples, stages bounded skill/rule proposals, and records validation gate results. Does not mutate skill files or read full transcripts automatically.

Read-only skill capability map list/search/detail query for ORC/cognitive preflight skill selection; merges core and extension capabilities, classifies by category, role, triggers, apply phase, setup notes, provenance, and verification.

Read-only extension capability map builder/query. Builds memory/workspace/extension-capability-map.json from bundled extension manifests so extension skills become ORC-routable capabilities with triggers, roles, setup notes, and provenance.

Extension and skill ingestion hub: List/Inspect/RebuildMap are low-risk; can adopt a reviewed local skill/plugin. Adopt copies a local skill/plugin into extensions/<id> and requires explicit user intent.
Read-only structured intent-route regression runner. Non-strict mode preserves declared draft gaps; strict mode requires every observed route to match its expected route.

Cold-path install.bat/UI/share/memory-import/cleanup/hot-refresh report-only regression gate; release-readiness treats missing or stale report as blocking after package, extension, manifest, install, share, or UI changes.

memoryShortcut: memory:auto；G1 governs, ORC routes, Sandglass Hybrid Recall only on semantic/keyword recall; stable state only; private memory requires confirmation and [PRIVACY].

memoryRouter.retrieval: hybrid: sandglass + graph + state + recent with semantic + keyword scoring

recallTrigger: If the user mentions another session, previous work, remember, progress, accepted rules, Super Brain state, old decisions, or semantically depends on past context, search summary-first explicit memory and NexSandglass before answering.

extensions.name: Browser Act Suite
extensions.setupRequired: browser-act CLI must be installed locally by the receiving user when first needed.

extensions.name: ReverseLab Unified
extensions.installNote: Provides a unified Super Brain skill plus one-click deployment scripts. Recipients can run scripts/reverselab-deploy.ps1 -Apply -Profile Full -RegisterCodexMcp to clone/configure the external ReverseLab repositories, sync MCP dependencies, run the upstream all-tools installer, and verify status/toolcheck results.

skills.name: reverselab-unified
canDo: route reverse-engineering tasks to open-reverselab commands, Open-tgtylab MCP tools, or browser-act-skill-forge
detect whether both upstream ReverseLab repositories and MCP tools are available
run a one-click full deployment path for recipients when the external repositories or dependencies are missing
use local knowledge bases for PE/APK/CTF/website API reverse workflows
cannotDo: make external repositories available without cloning or bundling them
hide missing host-specific GUI/device setup from the final deploy report
skills.setupRequired: Run scripts/reverselab-deploy.ps1 -Apply -Profile Full -RegisterCodexMcp for full setup. Requires Git, Python/uv, network access for upstream repos/tools, and host-specific confirmation for GUI/device tools when upstream cannot automate them.
